question.label: Workload specifics
question.name: When you say 'we are the center of everything', what does that mean in terms of your workload and priorities?
question.description: Seeks to understand the impact of being central to everything on workload and clarity.

answer: to move forward my team has to write all the tickets both dev, backend, all we have to understand all lvels of this massive app

assessment.note: Describes the overwhelming scope and responsibility without clear prioritization — strong negative clarity signal.
